title: Lady Rev Ella Duncan-Williams: "Women Are Friends When They Don't Have an Interest": When Lust Meets Love on Let's Vibe With Steve
summary: Can a young man and a young woman really just be friends? Lady Reverend Ella Duncan-Williams joined Sunny 88.7 FM's youth show, Let's Vibe With Steve, for a candid conversation on the show's latest topic, When Lust Meets Love.

title: Dressing Gracefully: Flattering outfits for the Modern Christian Woman
summary:
“True elegance occurs when the outer wardrobe harmonizes beautifully with an inner spirit of grace”.
(1Peter 3:3-4)

title: Dressing Your Bump with Grace: A Christian Perspective on Pregnancy Apparel Faith & Family
summary:
Pregnancy is one of the most sacred seasons a woman can walk through. Your body is doing something extraordinary — nurturing new life, knit together by the very hands of God. And yet, for many expectant mothers, the question of what to wear can feel surprisingly stressful. Maternity fashion is an afterthought in many wardrobes, and for Christian women who care about modesty, comfort, and dignity, the options can feel even more limited.
But here is the truth: dressing your bump well is not vanity. It is stewardship.

title: Faith is Not Just for Sundays
summary:
There is a tendency, even among committed believers, to keep faith neatly contained — reserved for Sunday mornings, midweek services, and quiet devotional time. But the Christian life was never designed to fit inside a one-hour slot once a week. Faith is not a compartment. It is a lens through which everything else is seen.
The way we speak to our spouse when we are tired. The patience we extend — or withhold — to our children at the end of a long day. The integrity we bring to our work when no one is watching. The kindness we show a stranger, or the grace we offer ourselves when we fall short. These are not separate from our faith. They are expressions of it.
